offlineMessage.name: offlineMessage
offlineMessage.default: 'We''re currently offline. Please leave a message and we''ll get back to you as soon as possible.'

searchVector.name: searchVector
searchVector.type: tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (to_tsvector('english', content)) STORED

idx_embedding_512_hnsw.name: idx_embedding_512_hnsw
idx_embedding_512_hnsw.where: (embedding_512 IS NOT NULL AND enabled = true AND "indexStatus" = 'INDEXED'::"IndexStatus")

idx_embedding_768_hnsw.name: idx_embedding_768_hnsw
idx_embedding_768_hnsw.where: (embedding_768 IS NOT NULL AND enabled = true AND "indexStatus" = 'INDEXED'::"IndexStatus")

idx_embedding_1024_hnsw.name: idx_embedding_1024_hnsw
idx_embedding_1024_hnsw.where: (embedding_1024 IS NOT NULL AND enabled = true AND "indexStatus" = 'INDEXED'::"IndexStatus")

idx_embedding_1536_hnsw.name: idx_embedding_1536_hnsw
idx_embedding_1536_hnsw.where: (embedding_1536 IS NOT NULL AND enabled = true AND "indexStatus" = 'INDEXED'::"IndexStatus")

idx_thumbnail_cleanup.name: idx_thumbnail_cleanup
idx_thumbnail_cleanup.where: (("derivedFromVersionId" IS NOT NULL) AND ("deletedAt" IS NULL))

idx_thumbnail_lookup_covering.name: idx_thumbnail_lookup_covering
idx_thumbnail_lookup_covering.where: (("derivedFromVersionId" IS NOT NULL) AND ("deletedAt" IS NULL))

idx_unique_thumbnail.name: idx_unique_thumbnail
idx_unique_thumbnail.where: (("derivedFromVersionId" IS NOT NULL) AND ("deletedAt" IS NULL))
